svg.text: YOUR IDE — ALL ACCESS KNOWLEDGE VIA MCP
Results available to any MCP-connected IDE
HOW KNOWLEDGE IS BUILT — CORE API :3100
REST API · ttyd manager · session cache · Hub client
Sessions → extract → vector DB → inject into future sessions
Every IDE session starts with knowledge from past sessions
Each machine extracts knowledge locally. Hub relays queries so any MCP-compatible IDE sees knowledge from all hosts.
Knowledge relay · session sync · no data stored
Any IDE sees knowledge from A + B + C via MCP
in any IDE on Machine B
Any MCP-compatible IDE on any machine sees knowledge extracted from sessions on every connected machine.
